activities_projects.title: Measuring Shadow Length at Different Times
activities_projects.objective: Study change in shadow length during the day
steps: Place the stick vertically in sunlight
Measure shadow length in the morning, noon, and evening
Record and compare shadow lengths
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands relation between sun’s position and shadow length

activities_projects.title: Determining Angle of Incidence and Reflection
steps: Place mirror on white sheet
Shine laser at different angles and mark incident and reflected rays
Measure angles using protractor and verify reflection law
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct measurement of angles and verification (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Comparing Shadow Sharpness with Different Light Sources
activities_projects.objective: Understand effect of light source size on shadow
steps: Shine each light source on the object to form shadows
Observe sharpness and clarity
Record and compare observations
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns effect of light source dimensions on shadow quality

activities_projects.title: Creating a Simple Periscope with Calculated Angles
activities_projects.objective: Understand reflection and light path control
steps: Cut holes on opposite sides of the box
Fix mirrors at 45° using protractor for accuracy
Look through periscope to see objects indirectly
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies reflection principles and geometric angles
activities_projects.evaluation: Periscope works with correctly positioned mirrors (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Investigating Multiple Shadows
activities_projects.objective: Study effect of multiple light sources on shadow formation
steps: Place object in front of wall
Shine multiple torches from different angles
Observe number, size, and direction of shadows
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands superposition of shadows from multiple light sources

activities_projects.title: Reflection from Curved Mirrors
activities_projects.objective: Observe focal points of concave and convex mirrors
steps: Shine torch on concave mirror, move screen to locate focused light
Repeat with convex mirror and observe divergence
Compare light behavior for both mirrors
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands converging and diverging properties of mirrors

activities_projects.title: Shadow Angle vs Object Angle Experiment
activities_projects.objective: Study effect of object rotation on shadow
steps: Place object in front of wall and shine torch
Rotate object at different angles
Measure shadow orientation and compare with object angle
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects object orientation to shadow direction

activities_projects.title: Exploring Lateral Inversion
activities_projects.objective: Observe lateral inversion in plane mirrors
steps: Place letter/arrow in front of mirror
Observe reversed image
Record direction and explain inversion

activities_projects.title: Combining Shadows with Transparent and Opaque Materials
activities_projects.objective: Understand light partial blocking and shadow blending
steps: Shine torch through each material individually
Observe and compare shadows formed
Place materials together to see combined shadow effect
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns effect of different material transparency on shadows

activities_projects.title: Quiz on Reflection and Shadows
steps: Prepare five questions on angles, shadow properties, and mirror types
Prepare five questions on multiple shadows and light behavior
Exchange with a friend and solve
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of questions and answers (10 marks)
